parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', p.id,
  'project_name', p.name,
  'project_type', p.project_type,
  'property_type', p.property_type,
  'property_area_m2', p.property_area_m2,
  'budget_target', p.budget_target,
  'design_option', (SELECT json_build_object('title', d.title, 'description', d.description, 'rooms_layout', d.rooms_layout, 'technical_notes', d.technical_notes) FROM design_options d WHERE d.project_id = p.id AND d.is_selected = true LIMIT 1),
  'briefing', (SELECT json_build_object('summary', b.summary, 'objectives', b.objectives, 'rooms_affected', b.rooms_affected, 'style_preferences', b.style_preferences) FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = p.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  'next_version', COALESCE((SELECT max(version) FROM home_automation_proposals WHERE project_id = p.id), 0) + 1
) AS data
FROM projects p WHERE p.id = $1::uuid;
SELECT content, model_recommended, temperature FROM agent_prompts WHERE agent_name='agent_home_automation' AND prompt_type='system' AND is_active=true ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1;
